subcodes.first_line: O Abu'l-Hasan! Thy name hath been mentioned in the presence of the Wronged One. We make mention of thee through verses by whose light the earth and heaven have been illumined [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اباالحسن حضر اسمک لدی المظلوم ذکرناک بایات بنورها اشرقت الارض و السماء
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @praise and encouragement
